caption: A man with blonde hair and a blue shirt wearing white headphones appears in a video overlay against a purple background. He is positioned in the lower-left portion of the screen, with a decorated Christmas tree visible behind him. The main screen displays the word "ACROBAT" at the top and a black square containing a white wheel-like icon. Text below the icon reads "ng swats & interceptions" and "1 AP" is visible in the bottom right. A smaller version of the wheel icon with a plus sign is seen to the left of the man. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts from surprise with an open mouth to a smile while raising his index finger. The background elements and text remain static, while the man's facial expressions and hand gestures evolve as he reacts to the on-screen content.
